summary: Comprehensive testing of Cosmic Collective new features - ALL FEATURES WORKING. Tested: Light Therapy page with 7 chromotherapy colors and immersive sessions, Zen Garden with 5 interactive tabs (Plant Garden, Koi Pond, Sand Drawing, Lantern Release, Rain Scene), CelebrationBurst particle effects on mood logging and journal saving, and all zen-garden plant CRUD endpoints.
seed_data_creation: Created test plants (lotus, bamboo, fern, sage) during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features fully tested and working: 1) Light Therapy with 7 colors and immersive sessions, 2) Zen Garden with 5 tabs including authenticated plant care, 3) CelebrationBurst on mood/journal save. Navigation shows Light and Zen links. Dashboard shows Light and Zen quick action buttons.

light_therapy.color_selector: ✓ 7 color options (red, orange, yellow, green, blue, indigo, violet)
light_therapy.color_detail_card: ✓ Shows benefits, description, chakra, frequency when color selected
light_therapy.immersive_session: ✓ Full-screen color bath with breathing orb, timer, pause/end controls
light_therapy.breathing_sync: ✓ 'Breathe In' / 'Breathe Out' text syncs with orb animation

zen_garden.tabs: ✓ 5 tabs: Plant Garden, Koi Pond, Sand Drawing, Lantern Release, Rain Scene
zen_garden.plant_garden_unauthenticated: ✓ Shows 'Sign in to nurture your garden' when not logged in
zen_garden.plant_garden_authenticated: ✓ Shows 'Plant New' button, plant cards with water functionality
zen_garden.plant_creation: ✓ Can plant lotus, bamboo, bonsai, fern, sage
zen_garden.plant_watering: ✓ Water button works, shows 'Watered Today' after watering
zen_garden.koi_pond: ✓ Canvas with animated fish, ripple interactions on click
zen_garden.lantern_release: ✓ Input field + Release button, lanterns float up

celebration_burst.mood_logging: ✓ CelebrationBurst appears with 'Namaste' text when mood logged
celebration_burst.journal_saving: ✓ CelebrationBurst appears with 'Namaste' text when journal saved
celebration_burst.particle_animation: ✓ Colorful particles burst outward from center

backend_apis_tested: POST /api/zen-garden/plants - 401 without auth, 200 with auth (creates plant)
